languages.original_text: "I see no convincing reasons to reassess, much less interfere with the permanent establishment of these nascent bonds. Harmony is born out of disharmony, such is the alchemical principle. Just wait, colleague, patience is a virtue."

languages.text: "Не вижу достаточных причин для пересмотра и тем более для вмешательства в окончательное формирование зародившихся уз. Гармония рождается из дисгармонии, таков алхимический принцип. Умейте ждать, коллега, терпение суть добродетель".

"I see no convincing reasons to reassess, much less interfere with the permanent establishment of these nascent bonds. Harmony is born out of disharmony, such is the alchemical principle. Just wait, colleague, patience is a virtue."
languages.original_text: "Не вижу достаточных причин для пересмотра и тем более для вмешательства в окончательное формирование зародившихся уз. Гармония рождается из дисгармонии, таков алхимический принцип. Умейте ждать, коллега, терпение суть добродетель".

traits.locale_text: "I see no convincing reasons to reassess, much less interfere with the permanent establishment of these nascent bonds. Harmony is born out of disharmony, such is the alchemical principle. Just wait, colleague, patience is a virtue."

"I see no convincing reasons to reassess, much less interfere with the permanent establishment of these nascent bonds. Harmony is born out of disharmony, such is the alchemical principle. Just wait, colleague, patience is a virtue."

"I see no convincing reasons to reassess, much less interfere with the permanent establishment of these nascent bonds. Harmony is born out of disharmony, such is the alchemical principle. Just wait, colleague, patience is a virtue."

languages.text: «No veo ningún motivo convincente para la reevaluación ni mucho menos para la interferencia con el establecimiento permanente de estos nuevos vínculos. La armonía nace de la discordancia; tal es el principio de la alquimia. Espere, colega. La paciencia es una virtud».
languages.original_text: "I see no convincing reasons to reassess, much less interfere with the permanent establishment of these nascent bonds. Harmony is born out of disharmony, such is the alchemical principle. Just wait, colleague, patience is a virtue."

traits.locale_text: «No veo ningún motivo convincente para la reevaluación ni mucho menos para la interferencia con el establecimiento permanente de estos nuevos vínculos. La armonía nace de la discordancia; tal es el principio de la alquimia. Espere, colega. La paciencia es una virtud».

languages.text: 「これらの芽生えつつある絆の恒久的な確立を、見直す、ましてや干渉する説得力ある理由は、私には見当たりません。調和は不調和から生まれる――それが錬金術の原理です。まあ待ちなさい、同僚、忍耐は美徳ですよ」
languages.original_text: "I see no convincing reasons to reassess, much less interfere with the permanent establishment of these nascent bonds. Harmony is born out of disharmony, such is the alchemical principle. Just wait, colleague, patience is a virtue."

traits.locale_text: 「これらの芽生えつつある絆の恒久的な確立を、見直す、ましてや干渉する説得力ある理由は、私には見当たりません。調和は不調和から生まれる――それが錬金術の原理です。まあ待ちなさい、同僚、忍耐は美徳ですよ」

languages.text: “我看不到有任何需要重新进行评估的理由，遑论干预这些新生羁绊的永久建立了。和谐源于不和谐，这便是炼金术的原理。耐心点，同僚，耐心是种美德。”
languages.original_text: "I see no convincing reasons to reassess, much less interfere with the permanent establishment of these nascent bonds. Harmony is born out of disharmony, such is the alchemical principle. Just wait, colleague, patience is a virtue."

traits.locale_text: “我看不到有任何需要重新进行评估的理由，遑论干预这些新生羁绊的永久建立了。和谐源于不和谐，这便是炼金术的原理。耐心点，同僚，耐心是种美德。”

languages.text: "Ich sehe keinen Grund für eine neuerliche Beurteilung und keine Veranlassung in die dauerhafte Festigung diese aufkeimenden Bande einzugreifen. Harmonie wird aus Disharmonie geboren, das ist ein alchemistisches Prinzip. Wartet einfach ab, Kollegen, Geduld ist eine Tugend."
languages.original_text: "I see no convincing reasons to reassess, much less interfere with the permanent establishment of these nascent bonds. Harmony is born out of disharmony, such is the alchemical principle. Just wait, colleague, patience is a virtue."

traits.locale_text: "Ich sehe keinen Grund für eine neuerliche Beurteilung und keine Veranlassung in die dauerhafte Festigung diese aufkeimenden Bande einzugreifen. Harmonie wird aus Disharmonie geboren, das ist ein alchemistisches Prinzip. Wartet einfach ab, Kollegen, Geduld ist eine Tugend."

languages.text: « Je ne vois aucune raison valable justifiant une réévaluation, et encore moins d'interférer dans le renforcement de ces liens naissants. L'harmonie naît du chaos, c'est le principe même de l'alchimie. Vous verrez, collègue. La patience est une vertu. »
languages.original_text: "I see no convincing reasons to reassess, much less interfere with the permanent establishment of these nascent bonds. Harmony is born out of disharmony, such is the alchemical principle. Just wait, colleague, patience is a virtue."

traits.locale_text: « Je ne vois aucune raison valable justifiant une réévaluation, et encore moins d'interférer dans le renforcement de ces liens naissants. L'harmonie naît du chaos, c'est le principe même de l'alchimie. Vous verrez, collègue. La patience est une vertu. »

languages.text: "Bu yeni oluşan bağların kalıcı olarak kurulmasını yeniden değerlendirmek, hele müdahale etmek için hiçbir ikna edici neden göremiyorum. Uyum, uyumsuzluktan doğar. Simyasal ilke budur. Sadece bekle meslektaşım, sabır erdemdir."
languages.original_text: "I see no convincing reasons to reassess, much less interfere with the permanent establishment of these nascent bonds. Harmony is born out of disharmony, such is the alchemical principle. Just wait, colleague, patience is a virtue."

traits.locale_text: "Bu yeni oluşan bağların kalıcı olarak kurulmasını yeniden değerlendirmek, hele müdahale etmek için hiçbir ikna edici neden göremiyorum. Uyum, uyumsuzluktan doğar. Simyasal ilke budur. Sadece bekle meslektaşım, sabır erdemdir."
